title: Tick Control Westbury, Long Island | $125 – $325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Westbury, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Prices from $125 – $325. Call today for fast service!
intro: Westbury's beautiful residential neighborhoods and proximity to Eisenhower Park make it a wonderful place to live, but the area's lush green spaces also create ideal habitats for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Westbury, protecting your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our proven treatment methods eliminate ticks from your property at competitive prices ranging from $125 to $325.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings years of specialized experience serving Long Island communities like Westbury with safe, effective tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments tailored to your property's specific needs, ensuring thorough protection with fast response times and exceptional customer service.
localContext: From the tree-lined streets near the Old Westbury Gardens to properties bordering Eisenhower Park, Westbury homes face unique tick challenges due to the area's abundant green spaces and wildlife activity. Our technicians understand the local environment and know exactly where ticks hide on Westbury properties, from overgrown garden borders to wooded edges along residential lots.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Westbury typically runs from April through November, with peak activity during the warmer months of May through September. However, ticks can be active during mild winter days, so year-round vigilance is important for Long Island properties.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Westbury range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping people and pets off treated areas until they're completely dry, typically 2-4 hours after application.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Westbury properties. Our team serves all Westbury neighborhoods promptly, and we can schedule treatments at your convenience to ensure your yard is protected as quickly as possible.
